---
name: Bug report
about: Something isn't working as expected
title: '[Bug] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Describe the bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## To reproduce

Steps to reproduce the behaviour:

1. Run `repomem ...`
2. See error

## Expected behaviour

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behaviour

What actually happened. Include the full error message or output.

## Environment

```
Python version: (python3 --version)
RepoMem version: (git rev-parse --short HEAD in the RepoMem repo)
OS: (macOS / Linux / Windows)
Claude Code version: (if relevant)
```

## Doctor output

```
repomem doctor
```

Paste the full output here.

## Additional context

Any other context — screenshots, logs from `~/.repomem/logs/`, etc.
